title: ASS-ADE — MAP = TERRAIN (canonical extension map)

mapEqualsTerrain.rule: Prefer extending existing ass_ade / AAAA-Nexus / .ass-ade artifacts before adding parallel manifests, ad hoc MCP servers, or undocumented hook scripts.

cursorHostPointers.note: Host-specific JSON lives outside this repo; document ids and env var names only.

acceptanceChecklist: New MCP tools: extend mcp/server.json + registry; run tests/test_mcp_manifest_parity.py and tests/test_mcp_extended.py.
New hooks: document in mcp-hooks-compatibility.v0.json; no secrets in commands.
New Python: route via tier-map.json; no upward imports between a0–a4.
Emitted consumer rebuilds: emit_runnable_package merge + smoke tests (see package_emitter).
